context: Customers can request a full refund within 14 days of purchase. Refunds are processed in 5 business days.
Two-factor authentication is mandatory for admin users. Password reset links expire after 30 minutes.
Standard delivery takes 3 to 5 business days. International delivery can take up to 12 business days.
Critical incidents are acknowledged within 30 minutes and resolved within 4 hours under enterprise SLA.
Enterprise contracts include a dedicated account manager and quarterly architecture reviews.
Invoices are issued on the first day of each month and payable within 15 calendar days.
API credentials rotate automatically every 90 days for regulated accounts.
Data exports are available in CSV and Parquet formats through the admin portal.
